items.title: How many Notre Dame players will be selected in the NFL Draft?
items.summary: ESPN’s Matt Miller recently put out a 7 round mock NFL Draft, and he has six Notre Dame Football players selected in the first 190 picks. items.title: Notre Dame Football and the test before the battle with Southern Cal
items.summary: I know USC has decided to take Notre Dame off their future schedule. And as someone who grew up in Southern California—who experienced this rivalry not just on Saturdays, but in everyday life—I can’t help but feel that loss a little more deeply. Because this wasn’t just a game where I grew up. It was […]
